hero.intro: I develop modern, clear, and well-structured web experiences designed to build trust and drive results.

project1.title: MenuTacos - Digital menu for a restaurant
project1.description: Responsive digital menu for a fast-food restaurant, built with HTML, JavaScript and Tailwind CSS. It lets users browse categories with smooth scrolling and a mobile-first structure designed to help customers check the menu and decide quickly.

project2.title: Transport PM
project2.description: Corporate website built with WordPress for a transport and moving company. It showcases national and international services, routes, FAQs, testimonials and direct WhatsApp contact, with a responsive design focused on turning visits into quote requests.

project3.title: Personal portfolio
project3.description: My main personal website built with React and Bootstrap. It is fully responsive, has light/dark mode and multi-language support, and showcases my best projects with smoother hierarchy and a clearer recruiter-friendly layout.

project4.title: Coleman Ediciones
project4.description: Online bookstore for the independent publisher Coleman Ediciones, developed with WordPress. It includes a book catalogue, author pages, online purchasing and a news section, all within a clean and fully responsive design.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a web developer trained in the Dutch MBO-level 4 program 'Application and Media Development' (Applicatie- en mediaontwikkelaar), with a hands-on and result-driven mindset. I'm passionate about technology, enjoy learning new tools, and I'm always looking to improve my skills. I'm currently building my professional portfolio and preparing for new opportunities in the Dutch IT sector.
about.card1Text: I enjoy finding practical solutions to technical challenges.
about.card2Text: I love learning and improving my skills every day.
about.card3Text: I commit to each project to deliver the best possible outcome.

footer.description: I build modern web products: performance, clean design, and great DX.
